title: Uniface Messages 7000-7999

Uniface Messages 7000-7999

Uniface Messages 7000-7999

Refer to the Uniface message number, message text, and an explanation of the message.

The following table refers to messages with numbering between 7000-7999.

179 rows found
Message numberMessage textExplanation
179 rows found
179 rows found
179 rows found
Message number
Message text
Explanation
7003 Nonvalid version number. Specify a number greater than the previous version number. You entered an nonvalid version number. Enter a number that contains more digits than the previous number, for example 1.1.1 instead of 1.1. Version numbers can contain a maximum of five digits only.
7004 Object ObjectName, branch Branch is locked. Action not allowed. The object is being updated by another user.
7006 Source SourceName exists and is open. Unlock the object to supersede. The source for the specified object exists in your repository. Choose File > Unlock and try again. Your updates supersede the existing source.
7013 Nonvalid object type. An error occurred in the way you defined your object, or the object type you entered was incorrect for the field.
7014 Mandatory fields must contain data. You have not specified mandatory information. For example, you did not enter the object name or library. Enter the information.
7015 A frozen release cannot be updated. Continue? When you freeze a release, you cannot update it again unless you choose Files > Save As and make a copy. Click OK to freeze the release.
7016 No modifications found in database. You tried to store data, but no modifications were made. The store was not executed.
7017 Error. See message frame. This a general error message, see the message frame for more information.
7019 Profiles not allowed with this action. You cannot enter a retrieve profile for an object name with Delete or Put. Specify a unique, valid object name and retrieve.
7021 Cursor not on a field. Action not allowed. You tried to use a menu action on a field type that is not valid, for example, a command button or a check box. Position the pointer on a valid field type and try again.
7023 Objects are loaded. The release was generated successfully.
7025 Release is frozen. Action not allowed. You cannot update or add more objects to a release when it is checked as frozen. You must create a new release of updated objects. It is useful to save an unfrozen copy of a release as a backup.
7032 Close without analyzing? Click Close to quit the form without performing the Analyze action.
7034 Analyze completed. The Analyze action has completed. All discrepancies between versions and objects in the repository and the version control system were resolved.
7035 Object %%$$UP_MESS1, branch %%$$UP_MESS2 not found in your Repository. The object or branch you specified does not exist in your repository. Check if the name and branch are correct.
7036 Version Version still exists in Release Release. Delete not allowed. You tried to delete a version that is used in a release. First delete the version from the release.
7037 Cannot create OCX Control: %1!s! This error may be due to several reasons. These include license issues, the OCX is not installed correctly, or you are using an incorrect version of the OCX.
7038 Unhandled Data type. This may be caused by a mismatch between the OCX data type and the data type in your database. If this is not the reason, contact your Uniface representative.
7039 Exception caught: %1!s! OCX has caused an exception that Uniface cannot handle. Contact your Uniface representative.
7040 Field: %1!s! not found. The field is not present on this form.
7041 Field: %1!s! does not contain an OCX control. The OCX field is defined as an OCX container field, but does not contain an OCX.
7042 Field: %1!s! is not an OCX container. The field exists but is not defined as an OCX container field.
7043 Retrieval of value property failed. The property does not exist or cannot be retrieved.
7060 Invocation of method: %1!s! failed, error=%2!s! The method was not found in the OCX, or the invocation failed for some other reason.
7061 Failed to convert parameter (%1!d!) to the expected type. One of the parameters used in the method invocation cannot be converted to the expected type.
7062 The OCX contained by field: %1!s! does not implement method: %2!s! The method you invoked is not implemented in this OCX.
7063 The OCX: %1!s! does not implement the property: %2!s! The property is not supported by the OCX.
7064 Parameter out of range. This message is self-explanatory.
7065 Parameter (%1!d!) is empty, zero value supplied. You did not supply a parameter for the method.
7066 No OCX Name given. The OCX in the container has not yet been named.
7080 Setting locale: %1!s!, result: %2!s! The local setting has been changed to the language displayed, with this result.
7137 Closing path $%%$currpath$... This message is self-explanatory.
7150 No items exist for $CATEGORY. This message is self-explanatory.
7151 Could not synchronize archive and table. This message is self-explanatory.
7152 Define a version. This message is self-explanatory.
7153 No items found with this profile. This message is self-explanatory.
7154 Specify a $$UP_MESS1. You need to specify this component.
7155 You must select a CFG file. This message is self-explanatory.
7156 Unable to delete the project. See message frame. The message frame contains information on why the project was not deleted.
7157 You have no promotion privileges. This message is self-explanatory.
7158 Some archives were not promoted. See error log. The error log contains information on why certain archives were not promoted.
7159 All archives were promoted successfully. This message is self-explanatory.
7160 No ASCII files match the profile you specified. This message is self-explanatory.
7161 Could not delete the release because some labels were not removed. See error log. You need to remove all labels before deleting a release. The error log contains more detailed information on which labels you need to remove.
7162 Form $FORM has been run. This message is self-explanatory.
7163 Release is locked. Unlock the release to modify it. This message is self-explanatory.
7164 Some archives were not copied. See error log. The error log contains more detailed information on which archives were not copied.
7165 The application list was copied successfully. This message is self-explanatory.
7166 Specify a log file name. This message is self-explanatory.
7167 Loading objects into the Repository. This message is self-explanatory.
7168 Some archives were not loaded (checked out). See error log. The error log contains information on why the archives were not loaded.
7169 The release was loaded successfully. This message is self-explanatory.
7170 Select an application and click Ok to copy it to a release. This message is self-explanatory.
7171 Searching for application list. This message is self-explanatory.
7172 Copying %%app.dummy to $REL_NAME $REL_VER. This message is self-explanatory.
7173 Copy completed. This message is self-explanatory.
7174 Retrieving objects in this release. This message is self-explanatory.
7175 Validating object. This message is self-explanatory.
7176 Could not add %%otype.obj to this release. This message is self-explanatory.
7177 Retrieve completed. This message is self-explanatory.
7178 Some objects were not added. See message log. The message log contains more detailed information on which objects were not added.
7179 Object must be blank to view list. To view a list of all possible values for this object, double-click in the field. Tthe field must first be blank.
7180 Profile characters not allowed for revision. This message is self-explanatory.
7181 Define a release. This message is self-explanatory.
7182 You have not defined any releases. This message is self-explanatory.
7183 Could not set defaults. This message is self-explanatory.
7184 %%$1%%% Defaults loaded. This message is self-explanatory.
7185 Object is not under version control. This message is self-explanatory.
7187 You must specify a path. This message is self-explanatory.
7188 Opening path $%%path, please wait... This message is self-explanatory.
7189 Retrieving list of tables from $%%path, please wait... This message is self-explanatory.
7190 Failed to retrieve driver banner, status %%$status. The value of $status provides information on why the driver banner was not retrieved.
7191 Failed to retrieve list of tables, status %%$status. The value of $status provides information on why the list of tables was not retrieved.
7193 You must select one or more tables. This message is self-explanatory.
7202 Incorrect Print Job Model specified. You entered a nonvalid print job model. Check the name, or click the button adjacent to the Print Job Model field to display a list of print job models.
7203 Nonvalid Print Option. The print option you specified was not valid. Specify a valid print option for your operating system. The print option you enter here is appended to the operating system print command.
7211 Specify an SQL command. You did not enter the SQL command after clicking the SQL button. Enter the command and try again.
7401 Repository API could not be started. A Uniface form may be incorrectly re-assigned or missing. For more information, see the message frame.
7411 Creating Signature: '%%$$UP_MESS1%%%' Self explanatory.
7412 Signature API error. For more information, see the message frame.
7500 Cannot generate Entity Service for a non-database entity. You can create an entity service only if the current entity in the Define Entity form is a database entity.
7501 Cannot generate entity service: component %%$$UP_MESS1%%% already exists. The component you specified already exists.
7502 Entity Service name will be truncated to 16 characters. If the name of the entity service that you entered on the Define Entity form is longer than 16 characters, it is truncated to 16 characters in the Generate Entity Service form.
7503 Cannot generate Entity Service: one or more painted fields exist in the generic entity %%$$UP_5%%%. The generic entity must not contain any fields before you generate the entity service.
7504 Cannot generate entity service: entity %%$$UP_MESS1%%%, painted on component You can generate an entity service only if the entity painted on the component template is a generic entity.
7505 Cannot generate entity service: no entities painted on Component Template %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You can generate an entity service only if the component template contains one generic entity.
7506 Cannot generate entity service: too many entities painted on Component Template %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. When you generate an entity service, the component template can contain only one entity, and this entity must be a generic entity.
7507 Cannot generate entity service: too many entities painted on Component Template %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You must use a valid component template when generating an entity service.
7508 Cannot generate entity service: component template %%$$UP_MESS1%%% not found. Load default Entity Service templates first. The default entity service template is U_OBJSVC_1ENT. You must load this template before generating an entity service.
7509 Cannot generate entity service: unable to create component structure for entity service %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. The entity on the entity service, which was bound from the component template, could not be renamed. Therefore, the component structure could not be used.
7510 No new %%$$UP_MESS1%%% has been generated. (Note: $$UP_MESS1 can be Form, Session Service, Entity Service etc. This message is usually caused by one of the following:
  • The current entity is a non-database entity.
  • The component template already contains more than one entity.

    The entity that is painted on the component template is not generic.

  • The template you are using is invalid.
7511 Entity service %%$$UP_MESS1%%% has been generated successfully. Self-explanatory.
7512 Cannot generate Entity Service: an entity name has not been specified. You must specify an entity name in the Define Entity form.
7609 Fill in the apStart trigger before compiling. This trigger contains no ProcScript statements. It should contain at least an activate statement to start the first component.
7800 Cannot find Repository table %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7801 Cannot export global object %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7802 Cannot export file %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7803 Cannot write archive file %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7804 No archive definition for %%$sub in Repository. Self-explanatory.
7805 Object type for archive item %%$sub unknown. Self-explanatory.
7806 Cannot export descriptor %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7807 Nothing to export for archive %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7808 Cannot export component %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7809 Cannot export signature %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7810 Cannot export initial data for entity %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7811 Cannot export DTD %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7812 Cannot export counter %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7813 Cannot export variables for library %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7814 Cannot export Proc module %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7815 Cannot export device table %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7816 Cannot export keyboard table %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7817 Cannot export panel %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7818 Cannot export message %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7819 Cannot export button text %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7820 Cannot export help text %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7821 Cannot export editor message %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7822 Cannot export date time property %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7823 Cannot export toggle symbol %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7824 Cannot export Japanese era %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7825 Cannot export glyph %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7826 Cannot export menu %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7827 Cannot export Readme text of archive %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7828 Cannot export drag & drop format %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7829 Cannot export date-time format %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7830 %%$sub out of %%$sub(1) objects exported. Self-explanatory.
7831 Cannot export entity descriptor for entity %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7900 Cannot load archive file %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7901 File %%$sub is not a Uniface Archive file. Self-explanatory.
7902 Archive file %%$sub has different Uniface version. Self-explanatory.
7903 Cannot extract Readme text from archive %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7904 Cannot write component file for component %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7905 Cannot write text or binary file %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7906 Cannot deploy global object %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7907 Cannot deploy data for entity %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7908 Cannot deploy DTD %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7911 Cannot deploy counter %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7912 Cannot deploy variable %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7913 Cannot deploy Proc module %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7914 Cannot deploy device table %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7915 Cannot deploy keyboard table %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7916 Cannot deploy panel %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7917 Cannot deploy message %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7918 Cannot deploy button text %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7919 Cannot deploy help text %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7920 Cannot deploy editor message %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7921 Cannot deploy date-time property %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7922 Cannot deploy toggle symbol %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7923 Cannot deploy Japanese era %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7924 Cannot deploy glyph %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7925 Cannot deploy menu %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7926 Cannot deploy drag & drop format %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7927 Cannot deploy date-time format %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7928 Command line switch /asn is missing. Self-explanatory.
7929 Assignment file %%$sub cannot be loaded. Self-explanatory.
7930 Command line switch /uar is missing. Self-explanatory.
7931 Command line options incorrect. Use the /hlp command line switch for more details.
7932 Paths in assignment file %%$sub cannot be resolved. Self-explanatory.
7933 Occurrences for %%$sub could not be deployed. Self-explanatory.
7934 I/O errors occurred while deploying entity %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7935 One or more occurrences of entity %%$sub are locked. Self-explanatory.
7938 Archive file %%$sub is corrupted. Self-explanatory.
7939 Unable to log deployment actions for %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7940 Failed to deploy entity %%$sub due to a user break. Self-explanatory.
7941 General error. Self-explanatory.
7942 Cannot deploy entity descriptor for entity %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
7950 The Uniface archive has been deployed successfully. Self-explanatory.
7951 The Uniface archive has been deployed with errors. Self-explanatory.
7952 The Readme text has been extracted from the Uniface archive. Self-explanatory.
7953 Archive contents have not been deployed. Self-explanatory.
7954 Nothing to deploy. Self-explanatory.
7955 Deployment of %%$sub objects: Self-explanatory.
7957 %%$sub "%%$sub(1)" deployed to "%%$sub(2)". Self-explanatory.
7958 %%$sub out of %%$sub(1) objects successfully deployed. Self-explanatory.
7965 Deployment of archive has been interrupted. Self-explanatory.
7968 %%$sub "%%$sub(1)" will be deployed to "%%$sub(2)". Self-explanatory.
7969 Failed to deploy entity %%$sub due to logon errors. Use the /log switch to complete the logon path if not complete in the assignment file.
7970 Cannot claim enough memory for deployment actions. Self-explanatory.
7971 Data decompression failed due to data corruption errors. Self-explanatory.
7972 Cannot deploy entity descriptor %%$sub. Self-explanatory.
